_comment: Registered contributor accounts for the $BNUT bounty system. Each entry tracks a contributor's GitHub username, optional Optimism Mainnet wallet address, and cumulative BNUT earnings. Wallet addresses are required before any payout can be queued. Add new contributors by appending to the 'contributors' array.

contributors.notes: Repo owner and maintainer. Update walletAddress to your Optimism Mainnet address to receive test payouts.
GitHub Copilot AI contributor. Assign a designated wallet address to receive $BNUT rewards for closed issues.
